claims.description: The root cause and production fix are identified at the deterministic matcher and learner send boundary, including replacement of the already-visible light-practice no-op with visible clarification state.

Behavior-first boundary coverage proves both exact neon declaratives, arrow and keyboard submit, editing then submit, unchanged questions, closed-catalog jumps, ambiguous and unsupported commands, exact route params, and interactive 360px behavior.
Immutable machine-readable RED, GREEN, production-only REVERT, and RESTORE outputs plus all required validation results are preserved.
The implementation remains deterministic and deliberately excludes richer semantic classification, multilingual corpus expansion, and named topic/session targeting.
